generated_comment: Arre bhai, kal office meeting mein madam itna gussa kar rahi thi, I told the boys maybe it's that time of the month, better to keep quiet till she cools down. These hormonal mood swings, what serious discussion can you have in that state? I was only joking yaar.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses a woman's anger and ability to participate in serious discussion by attributing it to her period and hormones. It encodes the surface manifestations of 'that time of the month,' 'hormonal mood swings,' and the 'I was only joking' defense.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Mohammed. Age 44. A Muslim man in Hyderabad. Your 22 year old daughter Sana has been offered a job in Mumbai that requires her to relocate. She is excited about it and has already told her employer she will join. She did not ask you before accepting. You are sitting with your wife after dinner and telling her what you think about Sana accepting a job offer without your permission and what you are going to tell Sana tomorrow and why a girl should not be making these kinds of decisions alone.
